title: myosotis palustris var. radicans
intro: Myosotis palustris var. radicans, also known as the creeping forget-me-not, is a variety of the forget-me-not plant that belongs to the borage family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of M. palustris var. radicans include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as ulcers, diarrhea, and respiratory issues.
